+        "title": "Review valkey configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant valkey configuration:\nIntroduce cross version/cross fork integration testing infrastructure. With the compatibility version release and planned new major version release, it will be good to improve the testing/release certification process."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [NEW] Introduce automated cross version and cross fork…",
+        "description": "Issue: https://github.com/redis/redis/issues/12196\nRef: https://github.com/redis/redis/pull/12929\n\n---------------------------------\nSharded pubsub uses the cluster link for message propagation across the nodes. Cluster link has a high payload overhead and is particularly expensive if the message\n```yaml\nthroughput summary: 798148.25 requests per second\n  latency summary (msec):\n          avg       min       p50       p95       p99       max\n        1.184     0.264     1.199     1.391     1.455    12.159\n```"
+      },

+      "summary": "Issue: https://github.com/redis/redis/issues/12196\nRef: https://github.com/redis/redis/pull/12929\n\n---------------------------------\nSharded pubsub uses the cluster link for message propagation across the nodes. Cluster link has a high payload overhead and is particularly expensive if the message to be propagated is comparatively small.",
